# MessagesSquare

data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MessagesSquare;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MessagesSquare { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
comment, chat, conversation, dialog, feedback, speech bubbles, copy, multiple, discussion, interview, debate

## Categories
social
